justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully migrate JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (e.g., TestDesignPizzaController still uses org.junit.Test instead of org.junit.jupiter.api.Test in some places, and imports are inconsistent). The SecurityConfig migration is incomplete with a manual comment placeholder. While @Serial annotations are added correctly, the incomplete test migration and manual migration comment reduce the quality.
